violations.text: Employee was observed not changing gloves and washing hands after handling an electronic ordering device. PIC instructed staff to wash hands and change gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The following were observed in poor repair: -bakery open freezer case non-functional (PIC stated work order in place) -gaskets to several customer-facing reach-in units (HVAC audit is due to be completed) -an exposed electrical wire held with tape on meat department reach-in -deli slicer non-functional (work order in place). New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -deli slicer -tracks to deli cases. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -walk-in fan guards -under pet food shelving The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The following were observed in poor repair: -ceiling tiles missing in produce and meat department back rooms -shelving in milk reach-ins (coating peeling) -lights non-functional under cook hoods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
No running water was observed at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2025

Ambient of the self-serve hot foods case was observed between 120- and 183 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC increased temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025

Ambient of the open-air case in the bakery department was observed at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed work order and all foods requiring refrigeration were moved to another unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
Multiple refrigerator and freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the salesfloor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
The open air case located in the bakery area was not in good repair, observed with an ambient temperature of 50 degrees. PIC placed work order during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
Condensation was observed on shelving in the ice cream freezers. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -shelving of bakery cabinets -vents of produce cases -tracks of deli case doors -shelving in several freezer/refrigerator units. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2025
A leak was observed at the prep sink faucet in the deli area prep room. PIC placed work order during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
Litter and leaf litter observed around trash compactor area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

The floors under multiple shelves in the food and pet food areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
The wall and coving at the door to the water room (in deli area) is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024

Popcorn chicken was observed held at 123-127 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of in the locked organics bin. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The bottom shelves in the bacon area of the cooler was not in good repair, with the coating peeling and missing in areas. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: meat display case, especially door tracks cupboards below counters knife rack in bakery area market shelves in cereal aisle New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The floor in the compactor area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
